name: Southwest Gas Holdings, Inc.
summary: Southwest Gas Holdings, Inc. is a holding company whose primary subsidiary, Southwest Gas Corporation, distributes natural gas to residential, commercial, and industrial customers. The company operates as a regulated local distribution company (LDC) serving customers in Arizona, Nevada, and California. It also held utility infrastructure services through Centuri Group Inc., which completed an IPO in April 2024 and was separated from the company.
